# RabbitEmergency.com

> Educational rabbit-emergency triage for owners across Asia, now available in English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, and Thai. Not a substitute for veterinary care.

## Languages
- English: https://rabbitemergency.com/
- Japanese: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/
- Traditional Chinese: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/
- Thai: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/

## Sitemap
- https://rabbitemergency.com/sitemap.xml

## All localized pages

## Rabbit emergency signs hub
- [Rabbit Emergency Signs: 100 Warning Signs and When to Go Now](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-emergency-signs/): 100 source-cited sign-specific triage pages for rabbit owners.
- [うさぎの救急サイン: 今すぐ受診すべき100の警告](https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-emergency-signs/): 100 source-cited sign-specific triage pages for rabbit owners.
- [兔子急症警訊：100個需要立即就醫的警告](https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-emergency-signs/): 100 source-cited sign-specific triage pages for rabbit owners.
- [สัญญาณฉุกเฉินของกระต่าย: 100 อาการเตือนที่ควรไปพบสัตวแพทย์ทันที](https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-emergency-signs/): 100 source-cited sign-specific triage pages for rabbit owners.
- [Rabbit not eating](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-not-eating-emergency-signs/): Not eating for 6-12 hours, no droppings, hunched posture, tooth grinding, cold ears, or a tight belly means call a rabbit-savvy vet now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-not-eating-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit not pooping](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-not-pooping-emergency-signs/): No droppings, tiny droppings, not eating, belly pain, lethargy, or cold ears can mean gut stasis or blockage and needs urgent veterinary contact.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-not-pooping-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-not-pooping-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-not-pooping-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit small droppings](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-small-droppings-emergency-signs/): Suddenly tiny, dry, misshapen, or fewer droppings with reduced appetite can be an early gut slowdown warning.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-small-droppings-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-small-droppings-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-small-droppings-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit no caecotrophs](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-no-caecotrophs-emergency-signs/): Missing or uneaten caecotrophs with soft stool, dirty bottom, reduced appetite, or weight change needs veterinary guidance.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-no-caecotrophs-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-no-caecotrophs-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-no-caecotrophs-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit soft stool](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-soft-stool-emergency-signs/): Soft stool with not eating, lethargy, dirty bottom, dehydration, or young age needs same-day rabbit-savvy vet advice.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-soft-stool-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-soft-stool-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-soft-stool-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit watery diarrhea](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-watery-diarrhea-emergency-signs/): True watery diarrhea, weakness, collapse, cold body, or baby-rabbit age is an emergency.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-watery-diarrhea-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-watery-diarrhea-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-watery-diarrhea-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit bloated belly](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-bloated-belly-emergency-signs/): A hard, tight, swollen, or painful belly with no eating, no droppings, lethargy, or tooth grinding means go now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-bloated-belly-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-bloated-belly-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-bloated-belly-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit belly pressed to floor](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-belly-pressed-floor-emergency-signs/): Pressing the belly to the floor with not eating, no droppings, bloat, or tooth grinding suggests pain and needs urgent contact.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-belly-pressed-floor-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-belly-pressed-floor-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-belly-pressed-floor-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit hunched posture](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-hunched-posture-emergency-signs/): A hunched rabbit with poor appetite, tooth grinding, belly pain, or fewer droppings needs prompt veterinary assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-hunched-posture-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-hunched-posture-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-hunched-posture-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit loud tooth grinding](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-tooth-grinding-pain-emergency-signs/): Loud tooth grinding with stillness, hunching, not eating, or belly pain usually signals pain and needs a vet call.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-tooth-grinding-pain-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-tooth-grinding-pain-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-tooth-grinding-pain-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit lethargic](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-lethargic-emergency-signs/): Sudden lethargy, not moving, not eating, cold ears, pale gums, or collapse is urgent in rabbits.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-lethargic-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-lethargic-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-lethargic-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit not moving](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-not-moving-emergency-signs/): A rabbit that is suddenly still, weak, floppy, cold, or barely responsive needs emergency veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-not-moving-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-not-moving-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-not-moving-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit floppy](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-floppy-emergency-signs/): A floppy rabbit, weak rabbit, or rabbit unable to sit normally should be treated as an emergency.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-floppy-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-floppy-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-floppy-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit collapsed](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-collapse-emergency-signs/): Collapse, unresponsiveness, severe weakness, abnormal breathing, heat exposure, or cold body means go now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-collapse-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-collapse-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-collapse-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit cold ears](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-cold-ears-emergency-signs/): Cold ears with lethargy, not eating, no droppings, weakness, or collapse can signal shock or hypothermia.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-cold-ears-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-cold-ears-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-cold-ears-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit cold body](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-cold-body-emergency-signs/): A cold rabbit with weakness, poor responsiveness, or gut stasis signs needs urgent warming guidance and veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-cold-body-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-cold-body-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-cold-body-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit heatstroke](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-heatstroke-emergency-signs/): Panting, drooling, red ears, weakness, collapse, seizures, or heat exposure means emergency care now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-heatstroke-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-heatstroke-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-heatstroke-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit overheated](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-overheated-emergency-signs/): An overheated rabbit with fast breathing, weakness, drooling, collapse, or warm environment exposure needs urgent cooling advice and a vet.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-overheated-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-overheated-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-overheated-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit panting](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-panting-emergency-signs/): Panting or open-mouth breathing in a rabbit is abnormal and should be treated as an emergency.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-panting-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-panting-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-panting-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit difficulty breathing](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-difficulty-breathing-emergency-signs/): Laboured breathing, open mouth, blue lips, noisy breathing, collapse, or severe distress means go now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-difficulty-breathing-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-difficulty-breathing-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-difficulty-breathing-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit mouth breathing](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-mouth-breathing-emergency-signs/): Mouth breathing in a rabbit is a go-now emergency because rabbits normally breathe through the nose.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-mouth-breathing-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-mouth-breathing-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-mouth-breathing-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit blue lips](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-blue-lips-emergency-signs/): Blue, gray, or very pale lips or gums with breathing trouble or weakness means emergency care now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-blue-lips-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-blue-lips-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-blue-lips-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit noisy breathing](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-noisy-breathing-emergency-signs/): Noisy breathing with effort, open-mouth breathing, weakness, discharge, or poor appetite needs urgent vet contact.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-noisy-breathing-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-noisy-breathing-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-noisy-breathing-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit sneezing with discharge](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-sneezing-discharge-emergency-signs/): Sneezing with thick discharge, wet paws, noisy breathing, poor appetite, or lethargy needs veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-sneezing-discharge-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-sneezing-discharge-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-sneezing-discharge-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit runny nose](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-runny-nose-emergency-signs/): Runny nose with not eating, breathing effort, wet forepaws, feverish behavior, or eye discharge needs a vet call.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-runny-nose-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-runny-nose-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-runny-nose-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit choking](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-choking-emergency-signs/): Choking, gagging, pawing at the mouth, drooling, blue lips, or breathing distress means go now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-choking-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-choking-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-choking-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit gagging](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-gagging-emergency-signs/): Gagging with distress, drooling, choking signs, food exposure, or breathing changes needs urgent veterinary help.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-gagging-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-gagging-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-gagging-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit drooling](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-drooling-emergency-signs/): Drooling, wet chin, dropping food, mouth pain, tooth grinding, or not eating needs rabbit-savvy dental and medical assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-drooling-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-drooling-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-drooling-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit wet chin](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-wet-chin-emergency-signs/): A wet chin with drooling, weight loss, not eating, or dropping food often signals dental disease and needs a vet.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-wet-chin-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-wet-chin-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-wet-chin-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit dropping food](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-dropping-food-emergency-signs/): Dropping food, chewing oddly, drooling, weight loss, or selective eating can mean dental pain and needs care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-dropping-food-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-dropping-food-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-dropping-food-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit overgrown teeth](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-overgrown-teeth-emergency-signs/): Visible tooth overgrowth, drooling, not eating, weight loss, or facial swelling needs rabbit-savvy veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-overgrown-teeth-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-overgrown-teeth-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-overgrown-teeth-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit face swelling](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-face-swelling-emergency-signs/): Facial swelling, jaw lump, eye discharge, drooling, or reduced eating can mean abscess or dental disease and needs a vet.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-face-swelling-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-face-swelling-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-face-swelling-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit eye discharge](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-eye-discharge-emergency-signs/): Eye discharge, swelling, squinting, cloudiness, trauma, or not eating needs same-day veterinary advice.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-eye-discharge-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-eye-discharge-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-eye-discharge-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit squinting eye](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-squinting-eye-emergency-signs/): A squinting, closed, cloudy, swollen, or painful eye can be urgent and should not be treated with leftover drops.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-squinting-eye-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-squinting-eye-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-squinting-eye-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit cloudy eye](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-cloudy-eye-emergency-signs/): Cloudy eye, bulging eye, injury, discharge, or head tilt needs veterinary assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-cloudy-eye-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-cloudy-eye-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-cloudy-eye-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit eye injury](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-eye-injury-emergency-signs/): Eye trauma, bleeding, visible scratch, chemical exposure, or inability to open the eye needs urgent care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-eye-injury-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-eye-injury-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-eye-injury-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit head tilt](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-head-tilt-emergency-signs/): Sudden head tilt, rolling, loss of balance, eye flicking, not eating, or weakness needs prompt rabbit-savvy veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-head-tilt-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-head-tilt-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-head-tilt-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit rolling](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-rolling-emergency-signs/): Rolling with head tilt, weakness, seizures, or inability to stay upright is urgent.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-rolling-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-rolling-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-rolling-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit loss of balance](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-loss-balance-emergency-signs/): Loss of balance, falling, head tilt, rolling, or weakness needs veterinary assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-loss-balance-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-loss-balance-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-loss-balance-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit seizure](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-seizure-emergency-signs/): A seizure, repeated seizure, heat exposure, toxin risk, collapse, or poor recovery means emergency care now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-seizure-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-seizure-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-seizure-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit trembling](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-trembling-emergency-signs/): Trembling with pain, heatstroke, toxin risk, weakness, not eating, or collapse needs urgent advice.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-trembling-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-trembling-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-trembling-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit back legs weak](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-back-legs-weak-emergency-signs/): Sudden hind-leg weakness, dragging, paralysis, pain, or fall history needs prompt veterinary assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-back-legs-weak-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-back-legs-weak-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-back-legs-weak-emergency-signs/

  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-dragging-back-legs-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-dragging-back-legs-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-dragging-back-legs-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit paralysis](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-paralysis-emergency-signs/): Sudden paralysis, inability to move, spinal injury concern, or severe weakness is an emergency.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-paralysis-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-paralysis-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-paralysis-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit limping](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-limping-emergency-signs/): Severe limping, swelling, pain, fall, bite, bleeding, or not eating after injury needs a vet call.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-limping-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-limping-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-limping-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit fall](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-fall-emergency-signs/): After a fall or being dropped, limping, pain, not eating, breathing changes, or weakness needs veterinary assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-fall-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-fall-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-fall-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit dropped](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-dropped-emergency-signs/): A dropped rabbit can hide spinal or internal injury; pain, weakness, limping, or appetite loss means urgent contact.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-dropped-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-dropped-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-dropped-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit hit by door](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-hit-by-door-emergency-signs/): Crush injury, door accident, limping, bleeding, breathing changes, or shock signs means go now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-hit-by-door-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-hit-by-door-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-hit-by-door-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit bleeding](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-bleeding-emergency-signs/): Heavy bleeding, bite wounds, pale gums, weakness, or bleeding that will not stop needs emergency care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-bleeding-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-bleeding-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-bleeding-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit broken nail](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-broken-nail-emergency-signs/): A broken nail that bleeds heavily, exposes tissue, causes limping, or will not stop bleeding needs veterinary guidance.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-broken-nail-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-broken-nail-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-broken-nail-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit open wound](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-open-wound-emergency-signs/): Open wounds, bite wounds, exposed tissue, swelling, pus, or pain need rabbit-savvy veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-open-wound-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-open-wound-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-open-wound-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit bite wound](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-bite-wound-emergency-signs/): Bite wounds can hide infection; bleeding, swelling, pain, abscess, or reduced appetite needs care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-bite-wound-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-bite-wound-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-bite-wound-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit abscess](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-abscess-emergency-signs/): A lump, abscess, pus, facial swelling, pain, or appetite loss needs rabbit-savvy veterinary treatment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-abscess-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-abscess-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-abscess-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit sore hocks](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-sore-hocks-emergency-signs/): Bleeding, ulcers, swelling, limping, infection signs, or pain from sore hocks needs veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-sore-hocks-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-sore-hocks-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-sore-hocks-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit flystrike](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-flystrike-emergency-signs/): Maggots, dirty bottom, bad smell, collapse, weakness, or hot weather exposure means emergency care now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-flystrike-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-flystrike-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-flystrike-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit dirty bottom](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-dirty-bottom-emergency-signs/): A dirty bottom with soft stool, urine scald, fly eggs, maggots, obesity, or poor mobility needs prompt action.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-dirty-bottom-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-dirty-bottom-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-dirty-bottom-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit maggots](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-maggots-emergency-signs/): Maggots or fly eggs on a rabbit are a life-threatening emergency.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-maggots-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-maggots-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-maggots-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit urine scald](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-urine-scald-emergency-signs/): Urine scald with wet fur, sores, sludge, mobility trouble, or dirty bottom needs veterinary assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-urine-scald-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-urine-scald-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-urine-scald-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit straining to urinate](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-straining-urinate-emergency-signs/): Straining, dribbling, blood, pain, or inability to pass urine needs urgent veterinary contact.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-straining-urinate-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-straining-urinate-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-straining-urinate-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit not peeing](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-not-peeing-emergency-signs/): Not peeing, straining, pain, sludge history, or weakness can be urgent and needs a vet call.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-not-peeing-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-not-peeing-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-not-peeing-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit blood in urine](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-blood-urine-emergency-signs/): True blood in urine, straining, pain, weakness, or reproductive disease concern needs veterinary assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-blood-urine-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-blood-urine-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-blood-urine-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit red urine](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-red-urine-emergency-signs/): Red urine can be pigment, but red urine with pain, straining, clots, weakness, or not eating needs a vet.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-red-urine-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-red-urine-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-red-urine-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit sludgy urine](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-sludgy-urine-emergency-signs/): Thick, gritty, or sludgy urine with straining, pain, urine scald, or reduced appetite needs care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-sludgy-urine-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-sludgy-urine-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-sludgy-urine-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit not drinking](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-not-drinking-emergency-signs/): Not drinking with not eating, small droppings, heat, weakness, or dehydration signs needs urgent guidance.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-not-drinking-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-not-drinking-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-not-drinking-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit dehydrated](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-dehydrated-emergency-signs/): Dehydration with lethargy, reduced droppings, sticky mouth, poor appetite, or heat exposure needs a vet.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-dehydrated-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-dehydrated-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-dehydrated-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit weight loss](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-weight-loss-emergency-signs/): Weight loss with drooling, poor appetite, small droppings, diarrhea, or lethargy needs veterinary assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-weight-loss-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-weight-loss-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-weight-loss-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit hiding](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-hiding-emergency-signs/): Hiding with reduced eating, pain signs, fewer droppings, or lethargy needs a rabbit-savvy vet call.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-hiding-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-hiding-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-hiding-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit sudden behavior change](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-sudden-behavior-change-emergency-signs/): Sudden behavior change with appetite, droppings, breathing, movement, or pain changes needs guidance.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-sudden-behavior-change-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-sudden-behavior-change-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-sudden-behavior-change-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit screaming](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-crying-screaming-emergency-signs/): A rabbit scream or cry usually means extreme fear or pain and should be treated as an emergency.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-crying-screaming-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-crying-screaming-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-crying-screaming-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit grinding teeth](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-grinding-teeth-emergency-signs/): Loud tooth grinding with hunched posture, stillness, not eating, or belly pain means urgent vet contact.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-grinding-teeth-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-grinding-teeth-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-grinding-teeth-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit shaking head](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-shaking-head-emergency-signs/): Head shaking with scratching, head tilt, discharge, crusts, or loss of balance needs veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-shaking-head-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-shaking-head-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-shaking-head-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit ear scratching](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-ear-scratching-emergency-signs/): Persistent ear scratching, crusts, discharge, head tilt, pain, or appetite loss needs rabbit-savvy care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-ear-scratching-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-ear-scratching-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-ear-scratching-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit ear discharge](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-ear-discharge-emergency-signs/): Ear discharge, crusting, smell, head tilt, pain, or loss of balance needs vet assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-ear-discharge-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-ear-discharge-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-ear-discharge-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit toxic plant exposure](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-toxic-plant-emergency-signs/): Known or suspected toxic plant exposure with any behavior change, drooling, weakness, diarrhea, or not eating needs urgent contact.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-toxic-plant-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-toxic-plant-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-toxic-plant-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit ate chocolate](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-ate-chocolate-emergency-signs/): Chocolate exposure, unknown dose, weakness, diarrhea, tremors, or not eating needs vet or poison-control guidance.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-ate-chocolate-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-ate-chocolate-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-ate-chocolate-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit ate human medicine](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-ate-human-medicine-emergency-signs/): Any human medicine exposure should be treated as urgent until a vet or poison-control service says otherwise.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-ate-human-medicine-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-ate-human-medicine-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-ate-human-medicine-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit ate rodenticide](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-ate-rodenticide-emergency-signs/): Rodenticide exposure can be dangerous before signs appear; call a vet or poison-control service now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-ate-rodenticide-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-ate-rodenticide-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-ate-rodenticide-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit ate onion or garlic](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-ate-onion-garlic-emergency-signs/): Onion, garlic, or unsafe food exposure with GI signs, weakness, or uncertain amount needs veterinary advice.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-ate-onion-garlic-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-ate-onion-garlic-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-ate-onion-garlic-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit ate houseplant](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-ate-houseplant-emergency-signs/): Unknown houseplant exposure should be checked with a vet or poison-control service, especially with drooling, diarrhea, or weakness.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-ate-houseplant-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-ate-houseplant-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-ate-houseplant-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit ate carpet or fabric](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-ate-carpet-fabric-emergency-signs/): Carpet, fabric, plastic, or foreign material ingestion with not eating, no droppings, or belly pain needs urgent advice.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-ate-carpet-fabric-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-ate-carpet-fabric-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-ate-carpet-fabric-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit ate plastic](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-ate-plastic-emergency-signs/): Plastic ingestion with reduced appetite, no droppings, belly pain, or choking signs needs veterinary guidance.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-ate-plastic-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-ate-plastic-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-ate-plastic-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit hair in gut](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-hairball-gut-emergency-signs/): Heavy moult with reduced appetite, smaller droppings, or belly pain can become gut slowdown and needs monitoring with vet guidance.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-hairball-gut-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-hairball-gut-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-hairball-gut-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit moulting and not eating](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-moulting-not-eating-emergency-signs/): Moulting plus reduced appetite, fewer droppings, or lethargy can become urgent gut stasis.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-moulting-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-moulting-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-moulting-not-eating-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit not eating after surgery](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-post-op-not-eating-emergency-signs/): A post-op rabbit not eating, not pooping, painful, cold, weak, or not urinating needs immediate veterinary guidance.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-post-op-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-post-op-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-post-op-not-eating-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit not pooping after surgery](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-not-pooping-after-surgery-emergency-signs/): No droppings after surgery with poor appetite or pain needs the surgical team or emergency vet.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-not-pooping-after-surgery-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-not-pooping-after-surgery-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-not-pooping-after-surgery-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit swollen incision](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-incision-swollen-emergency-signs/): A swollen, painful, bleeding, open, hot, or draining incision needs veterinary contact.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-incision-swollen-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-incision-swollen-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-incision-swollen-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit not eating after vet visit](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-after-vet-visit-not-eating-emergency-signs/): Stress after travel can trigger gut slowdown; not eating or fewer droppings after a vet visit needs prompt advice.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-after-vet-visit-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-after-vet-visit-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-after-vet-visit-not-eating-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit baby rabbit not eating](https://rabbitemergency.com/baby-rabbit-not-eating-emergency-signs/): A baby rabbit not eating, cold, weak, bloated, or having diarrhea needs urgent expert care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/baby-rabbit-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/baby-rabbit-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/baby-rabbit-not-eating-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit baby rabbit diarrhea](https://rabbitemergency.com/baby-rabbit-diarrhea-emergency-signs/): Diarrhea in a baby rabbit can become life-threatening quickly and needs urgent care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/baby-rabbit-diarrhea-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/baby-rabbit-diarrhea-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/baby-rabbit-diarrhea-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit pregnant rabbit labor trouble](https://rabbitemergency.com/pregnant-rabbit-labor-emergency-signs/): Heavy bleeding, prolonged straining, weakness, stuck kit, or collapse during labor needs emergency care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/pregnant-rabbit-labor-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/pregnant-rabbit-labor-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/pregnant-rabbit-labor-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit nesting and not eating](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-nesting-not-eating-emergency-signs/): A pregnant or recently kindled rabbit not eating, weak, bleeding, or distressed needs veterinary guidance.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-nesting-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-nesting-not-eating-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-nesting-not-eating-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit suddenly aggressive](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-aggressive-suddenly-emergency-signs/): Sudden aggression with pain signs, poor appetite, urinary signs, or behavior change can signal illness and needs assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-aggressive-suddenly-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-aggressive-suddenly-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-aggressive-suddenly-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit not grooming](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-not-grooming-emergency-signs/): Not grooming with dirty bottom, weight loss, pain, dental signs, or reduced appetite needs veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-not-grooming-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-not-grooming-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-not-grooming-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit wet front paws](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-wet-front-paws-emergency-signs/): Wet front paws can come from nasal discharge; paired with sneezing, poor appetite, or noisy breathing, it needs vet care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-wet-front-paws-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-wet-front-paws-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-wet-front-paws-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit pale gums](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-pale-gums-emergency-signs/): Pale or blue gums, weakness, collapse, bleeding, or breathing trouble means emergency care now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-pale-gums-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-pale-gums-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-pale-gums-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit fast breathing](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-fast-breathing-emergency-signs/): Fast breathing with effort, heat exposure, blue lips, weakness, or collapse means urgent veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-fast-breathing-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-fast-breathing-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-fast-breathing-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit restless and cannot settle](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-restless-can-not-settle-emergency-signs/): Restlessness with belly pain, not eating, no droppings, straining, or tooth grinding needs urgent care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-restless-can-not-settle-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-restless-can-not-settle-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-restless-can-not-settle-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit pressing head](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-pressing-head-emergency-signs/): Head pressing, severe disorientation, seizure, weakness, or toxin risk needs emergency assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-pressing-head-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-pressing-head-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-pressing-head-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit circling](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-circling-emergency-signs/): Circling with head tilt, loss of balance, weakness, or appetite loss needs rabbit-savvy veterinary care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-circling-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-circling-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-circling-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit not using litter box](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-not-using-litter-box-emergency-signs/): Sudden litter-box change with straining, red urine, sludge, pain, or appetite change needs a vet call.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-not-using-litter-box-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-not-using-litter-box-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-not-using-litter-box-emergency-signs/
